props.name: colors
props.description: An array of color strings to be used for the ribbons.

props.name: baseSpring
props.description: Base spring factor for the physics controlling ribbon motion.

props.name: baseFriction
props.description: Base friction factor that dampens the ribbon motion.

props.name: baseThickness
props.description: The base thickness of the ribbons.

props.name: offsetFactor
props.description: A factor to horizontally offset the starting positions of the ribbons.

props.name: maxAge
props.description: Delay in milliseconds controlling how long the ribbon trails extend.

props.name: pointCount
props.description: The number of points that make up each ribbon.

props.name: speedMultiplier
props.description: Multiplier that adjusts how fast trailing points interpolate towards the head.

props.name: enableFade
props.description: If true, a fade effect is applied along the length of the ribbon.

props.name: enableShaderEffect
props.description: If true, an additional sine-wave shader effect is applied to the ribbons.

props.name: effectAmplitude
props.description: The amplitude of the shader displacement effect.

props.name: backgroundColor
props.description: An RGBA array specifying the clear color for the renderer.
